subject: Ops note: rollout deployment schedule for Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-0301
body: Please note the rollout stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-0301. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: handoff, drop-bears.
